rules: Documentation is a linked system, not disconnected files.
Every page declares audience, owner, canonical path, evidence snapshot, prerequisites, parent backlink, next steps, related references, freshness trigger, and verification.
Commands, defaults, binaries, APIs, schemas, and configuration claims must be verified or marked unknown.
Multipage packages require orphan-page and broken-link checks.
Built binary documentation covers provenance, platform, installation, runtime files, commands, diagnostics, security, update, rollback, and removal.
